fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> with the specified arguments applied.
fields.summary: Creates a clone of this typeface with the specified font arguments applied.

params.args: The font arguments specifying the variation position, palette index, palette overrides, and collection index to apply.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> using the specified palette.
fields.summary: Creates a clone of this typeface using the specified color palette index.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette to apply.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> at the specified design position.
fields.summary: Creates a clone of this typeface with the specified variable font design position.

params.position: A span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values specifying the design position for each variation axis.

fields.summary: Gets a typeface that represents an empty (non-rendering) font.
fields.value: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> that contains no glyphs.

fields.returns: The number of axes written to <paramref name="axes" />.
fields.summary: Fills a span with the variation axis descriptors for this typeface.

params.axes: A span to receive the variation axis descriptors.

fields.returns: The number of coordinates written to <paramref name="coordinates" />.
fields.summary: Fills a span with the current design-space position for each variation axis of this typeface.

params.coordinates: A span to receive the variation position coordinates.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this typeface is the empty typeface.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if this typeface is the empty typeface; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axes defined in this typeface.
fields.value: The number of variation axis descriptors.

fields.summary: Gets the variation axis descriptors for this typeface.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> structs describing each variation axis.

fields.summary: Gets the current design-space position for each variation axis of this typeface.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values for each axis.

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axes for which a design position is available.
fields.value: The number of design position coordinates.
